title: Pentagonia pittieri
taxonomy: Pentagonia pittieri is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a member of the genus Pentagonia, which is a group of flowering plants native to Central and South America. Pentagonia pittieri is a tropical plant species that is often found in humid, subtropical forests. The classification of Pentagonia pittieri is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf shape and flower structure. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification and relationships within the genus Pentagonia.
